resources.string: [CS_947577]_Your blood sugar was within the ideal range for %2$s of the workout you started at %1$s. Touch for details.
[CS_946393]_It\'s time for a blood pressure measurement!
[CS_948123]_%1$s\'s step count is a little low. Touch for details.

[CS_655373]_This is used to scan QR codes to add devices and join groups, take photos to generate profile pics and record meals, support AI jump rope and real-name authentication, and provide more features.

[CS_655369]_This is used for sharing, downloading golf course maps, taking photos, adding watch faces, saving screenshots, temporarily saving audio files for Voice enhancement, changing profile pics, importing routes, and more.

[CS_655365]_This is used to track outdoor workouts, view golf course maps and Health community members\' locations, pair devices via Bluetooth, get weather reports on your wearable, obtain weather info to provide workout suggestions, recommend nearby marathon events, and more.
[CS_655370]_This is used to record sleep, diet log entries, and food names, as well as detect noise using Voice enhancement and more via audio input.
[CS_655374]_Read call status and mobile network information to provide call services, such as incoming call notifications, pausing workouts/audio prompts, activating cards, and more.
[CS_655368]_This is used for connected devices, to reject calls and more.
[CS_655372]_This is used to sync contacts, as well as set emergency contacts for wearables.
[CS_655367]_This is used to push missed call notifications to connected devices.
[CS_670320]_Your exercise records have been synced. Check them out now!
[CS_731166]_New ECG record. Check it out in the Health app.
[CS_738527]_This allows the device to send SMS messages when rejecting incoming calls and in other scenarios. This could incur additional fees.
[CS_654309]_Unable to unpair device here. Unpair it in Bluetooth settings.
[CS_758396]_This is used to allow broadcasts to be sent to the device.
[CS_838595]_This is used to provide Calendar reminders for events such as workouts, health check-ups, and more
[CS_937670]_This is used to calculate step count.
[CS_948956]_New ECG record. Check it out in the Health app.
[CS_951151]_You are using Bluetooth to transfer files to your wearable. You can use Wi-Fi to accelerate the process. Wi-Fi acceleration requires the Location permission. Go grant it in Settings >
[CS_951145]_Huawei Health supports file transfer via WLAN. This requires the Location permission. Grant it in Settings.
[CS_961005]_A new %1$s (%2$s) needs to be downloaded and updated on your device. Continue anyway?
[CS_937675]_You have a new blood pressure record. Touch to view details.
[CS_1004817]_Arrhythmia detected, suspected premature beats. Go to the Health app for more details.
[CS_1005089]_Arrhythmia detected, suspected A-fib. Go to the Health app for more details.
[CS_1004784]_Arrhythmia detected, risk of premature beats. Go to the Health app for more details.
[CS_1005028]_Arrhythmia detected, risk of A-fib. Go to the Health app for more details.
[CS_1028456]_This is used to scan, pair, and reconnect to devices.
[CS_960990]_New arterial stiffness record. Check it out in the Health app.
[CS_993071]_Unable to transfer wearable resource package update.
[CS_1102129]_This is so you can receive calls on your wearable, pause workouts and audio prompts during incoming calls, activate cards, and use other call-related features.
[CS_1099085]_Device disconnected. To ensure it works properly, open Huawei Health and reconnect.

[CS_1103757]_Open the Health app on your phone and go to Devices, select the device\'s card, and go to Watch connection protection to finish setup. This will help ensure you get WeChat, SMS, incoming call, event, and other notifications.
[CS_1178519]_Make sure to keep the device within %d meters of your phone.
[CS_1178499]_Make sure to keep it properly attached.
[CS_1178556]_Wait till the device temperature becomes normal again.
[CS_1178542]_Blood glucose data not yet available. Check again later.
[CS_1178531]_Blood glucose data unavailable due to device error. Consider getting a replacement.
[CS_1178523]_This device has reached the end of its lifecycle. Please replace it with a new one.
[CS_1178501]_Rapidly rising blood glucose level requires immediate attention. Keep an eye on it and verify with another test later.
[CS_1178555]_Rapidly dropping blood glucose level requires immediate attention. Keep an eye on it and verify with another test later.
[CS_1178515]_Your blood glucose is below the critical threshold of %1$s mmol/L. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
[CS_1178511]_Your blood glucose is below the critical threshold of %1$s mg/dL. Please closely monitor your glucose level.
[CS_1178557]_Your blood glucose is below the minimum set value of %1$s mmol/L.
[CS_1178504]_Your blood glucose is below the minimum set value of %1$s mg/dL.
[CS_1178535]_Your blood glucose is above the maximum set value of %1$s mmol/L.
[CS_1178552]_Your blood glucose is above the maximum set value of %1$s mg/dL.
[CS_1186009]_Make sure to wear your device daily to get the most complete record of your physical health.
[CS_1180170]_Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s days. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
[CS_1180149]_Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s hours. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
[CS_1180183]_Wear your band regularly to get continuous data and more accurate insights about your body.
[CS_1180164]_Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s day. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.
[CS_1180179]_Wear your watch regularly to get continuous data and more accurate insights about your body.
[CS_1180158]_Data hasn\'t updated for %1$s days. Open Huawei Health and reconnect the device to update your data.

[CS_1192600]_This is used to track outdoor workouts, view golf course maps and Health community members\' locations, pair devices via Bluetooth, generate e-warranty cards, record device activations, get weather reports on your wearable, obtain weather info to provide workout suggestions, recommend nearby marathon events, and more.
[CS_1005071]_This is used to redirect to different navigation apps from the running route details screen.

[CS_318755]_Understanding the science behind sleep, analyzing and finding poor sleeping habits and addressing the various factors that negatively impact sleep, and making timely adjustments can improve sleep quality. Huawei/Honor wearable devices scientifically assess your sleep quality and give you suggestions according to a methodology recognized by the Center for Dynamical Biomarkers (DBIOM) at BIDMC, a major teaching hospital of Harvard Medical School.
[CS_460683]_New weight data available. Check it out.
[CS_697650]_%1$s has new weight data available. Check it out.
[CS_706697]_Your sleep score is %d. Check out your sleep report in Huawei Health.
[CS_706698]_Your sleep score is %d. Check out more details in Huawei Health.
[CS_706699]_Your sleep score is %d. View your sleep report in Huawei Health.
[CS_799249]_Check out your sleep report in the Health app.
[CS_799222]_Check out more details in the Health app.
[CS_799212]_View your sleep report in the Health app.
[CS_810577]_You slept for %1$s last night. The quality of sleep was excellent.
[CS_810709]_Sleep is vital to recharging your energy levels. Sleep revitalizes your body.
[CS_810629]_You slept well last night. Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep.
[CS_810647]_Your mind and body recover during deep sleep. Getting enough deep sleep is the best way to replenish your energy and improve your memory.
[CS_810494]_During deep sleep, blood flow to your skin increases, and your skin starts to heal itself. Get plenty of sleep for a glowing complexion.
[CS_810513]_Your sleep quality last night was excellent. REM sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep.
[CS_810525]_Dreams mostly occur during REM sleep. Studies show that REM sleep helps to strengthen creativity.
[CS_810433]_Getting a full night\'s sleep allows your mind and body to rest and recuperate, so that you feel full of energy.
[CS_810446]_Your sleeping schedule has been irregular recently, but the quality of your sleep last night was good.

[CS_810476]_Maintaining a regular sleeping routine helps to set your body\'s natural rhythm. 10 pm to 6 am is the ideal time for rest. You can set alarms on your wearable device to help you sleep at regular times.
[CS_810530]_Your sleeping schedule has been irregular recently. Your sleep quality can be improved.
[CS_810658]_Going to sleep and waking up at the same time help to maintain regular sleep rhythms and improve sleep quality. You can use your wearable to set alarms to help stay on a regular schedule.
[CS_810668]_Your sleeping schedule has been irregular recently. Waking up at the same time everyday can help you stay on a regular sleeping schedule.
[CS_810517]_Waking up at the same time every day can help you stay on a regular schedule. Staying in bed too long can make you feel lethargic.
[CS_810489]_Your sleeping schedule has been irregular recently. For better sleep quality, take advantage of the ideal rest time from 10 pm to 6 am.
[CS_810730]_Last night, you fell asleep at %1$s, which was a little late, but the quality of your sleep was good.
[CS_810548]_Ensure adequate sleep time to give yourself plenty of energy. 10 pm to 6 am is the ideal time for rest. You can use Huawei Wear to set alarms to help staying on a regular schedule.
[CS_810464]_Ensure adequate sleep time to give yourself plenty of energy. You went to sleep at %1$s last night, which was a little late.
[CS_810704]_10 pm to 6 am is the ideal time for rest. You went to sleep at %1$s last night. Going to bed earlier can improve your sleep quality.
[CS_810654]_Use a wearable device to set alarms and remind yourself to stop working for the day. You can also listen to soft music or do stretches to help you relax before bed.
[CS_810684]_You woke up at %1$s this morning, which is a little early, but the quality of your sleep was good.

[CS_810694]_Waking up early in the morning does not mean that the quality of your sleep was bad, do not worry or feel stressed because you woke up early. Try reading or listening to music to help you relax.
[CS_810487]_You woke up at %1$s this morning, which was a little early, but the quality of your sleep last night was good.
[CS_810452]_If you wake up before you intend to and find it difficult to go back to sleep, try leaving the bedroom, reading, or listening to some music.
[CS_810562]_You woke up at %1$s this morning, which was a little early. Relaxing before bed can help you stay asleep longer.
[CS_810719]_Listening to soft music before bed can create a relaxing atmosphere and help you sleep better.
[CS_810467]_You woke up at %1$s this morning, which was a little early. Simple and repetitive movements can help you fall back asleep.
[CS_810477]_If you wake up before you intend to and find it difficult to go back to sleep, try leaving the bedroom, reading, or listening to some music.
[CS_810527]_You woke up at %1$s this morning, which was a little early. Activities that help you relax can make falling back asleep easier.
[CS_810659]_If you wake up too early in the morning and still feel tired, stay in bed, imagine your body feeling heavier, and relax every part of your body until you fall asleep again.
[CS_810681]_You woke up a bit early at %1$s this morning.
[CS_810524]_Stretching and jogging after waking up can relieve stress and keep your mood up. Put on your wearable device and do some exercises outdoors.
[CS_810490]_You\'ve been waking up early lately. Relaxing more can help improve sleep quality.

[CS_810458]_If you have trouble falling asleep after waking up, try writing down your thoughts to clear your mind. If you want to go back to sleep, try some breathing exercises or listen to music to help you relax.
[CS_810685]_You\'ve been waking up early lately. Adjusting your diet can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810549]_Maintaining a diet rich in protein and vitamins, and avoiding caffeine, tea, alcohol, and other stimulants to the central nervous system can help improve the quality of your sleep.
[CS_810459]_You\'ve been waking up early lately. Exercising more can help you relax and improve sleep quality.
[CS_810472]_Use your wearable device to set a jogging plan. Not only does jogging work out your body, the fresh air can also help you relax and improve sleep quality.
[CS_810695]_You\'ve been waking up early lately. Activities that help to relieve stress can improve sleep quality.
[CS_810661]_Don\'t worry about waking up too early, and focus on positive thoughts. Spending time with family and friends can help you relieve stress and maintain a positive outlook.
[CS_810675]_You woke up %1$s last night, but the quality of your sleep was good.
[CS_810698]_Turning off electronics or using Do not disturb mode can help you sleep without interruptions.
[CS_810445]_You woke up %1$s last night. Try drinking less water before bed to reduce the number of times you wake up.
[CS_810462]_Drinking too much water before bed can wake you up in the middle of the night. Instead, rehydrate with a glass of water in the morning, which can improve blood circulation.
[CS_810515]_You woke up %1$s last night, a comfortable sleeping environment can help you sleep better.
[CS_810713]_A cozy sleeping environment can help you sleep better. If there is too much noise or light in your bedroom, try changing your curtain or using earplugs.

[CS_810470]_Not checking the time when waking in the middle of the night helps to prevent anxiety and avoid anxiety-related insomnia. Listening to music or stretching may also help you to relax and fall back asleep.
[CS_810531]_You woke up %1$s last night. Moderate exercises can help improve the quality of your sleep.

[CS_810679]_Moderate exercise (such as speed walking and jogging) 3 or 4 times a week for half an hour can help improve the quality of your sleep. You can use the Huawei Health app to plan the intensity and length of your training.
[CS_810644]_You woke up %1$s last night, relaxing before bed can help you stay asleep longer.

[CS_810536]_Avoid strenuous mental activity before bed. Overthinking, watching TV or using your phone in bed can keep your mind active. Deep breathing exercises or other relaxing exercises before bed can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810444]_You slept %1$s last night, which is longer than the recommended amount, but the sleep quality was good.

[CS_810455]_Sleeping for too long slows down blood circulation. Oxygen and nutrients going to the muscles also decrease. If you have trouble getting out of bed or feel lethargic throughout the day, try managing how much you sleep.
[CS_810691]_You slept for %1$s last night, which is longer than the recommended amount. Exercise can help relieve the lethargy.

[CS_810541]_Oversleeping reduces the body\'s metabolic rate, which can make you feel fatigued or drowsy upon waking. Using your wearable device and exercising or going for a walk outside can help you feel more energized.
[CS_810456]_You slept for %1$s last night, which is longer than the recommended amount.
[CS_810666]_You slept for %1$s last night. Oversleeping on weekends can break up your regular sleeping schedule.
[CS_810676]_Oversleeping on the weekends can interrupt your regular sleeping schedule and upset your biological clock.
[CS_810514]_You slept %1$s last night, which was a little short. Maintaining a regular schedule can help you stay asleep longer.

[CS_810483]_Sufficient sleep leads to higher energy levels. Keep a regular biological clock by maintaining a routine sleep schedule. Strengthen your circadian rhythm by getting more sunlight during the day and avoiding brightly lit environments at night.
[CS_810492]_You slept for %1$s last night, which was a little short, but the quality of sleep was good.
[CS_810505]_A little more quality sleep can help you face the day with an even clearer mind. Finishing work earlier can give you more time to relax and rest in the evening.
[CS_810720]_You only slept for %1$s last night. Moderate exercise can help you stay asleep longer.
[CS_810569]_Sufficient sleep leads to higher energy levels. Exercising for half an hour or more %1$s a week can help improve sleep quality. Avoid high-intensity exercises before bed.
[CS_810437]_You slept %1$s last night, which is less than the recommended amount.
[CS_810635]_If you feel tired during the day, you might need more sleep. Listening to sound recordings of nature can calm you for a good night\'s sleep.
[CS_810688]_You only slept for %1$s last night, which was a little short. Avoiding large meals before bed can help you stay asleep longer.

[CS_810484]_If you feel tired during the day, you might need more sleep. Avoiding large meals within %1$s before bed gives your body enough time to digest and helps you sleep better. If you feel hungry at night, a light snack is best.
[CS_810507]_You only slept for %1$s last night. Moderate exercise can help you stay asleep longer.
[CS_810690]_Avoid high-intensity exercises before bed to make it easier to fall asleep.
[CS_810623]_If you feel tired during the day, you might need more sleep. Controlling temperature and humidity levels in your bedroom can improve sleep quality.
[CS_810554]_You only slept for %1$s last night. Having a quiet sleeping environment can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810740]_Noise pollution can lead to nocturnal awakenings and impact the continuity of your sleep. Maintain a quiet sleeping environment by closing your bedroom door and windows or using earplugs.
[CS_810439]_You slept for %1$s last night. You have not been getting enough sleep lately.
[CS_810632]_Napping before 1 pm can boost daytime energy levels. Over napping may affect night time sleep.
[CS_810537]_You slept for %1$s last night. You have not been getting enough sleep lately.
[CS_810496]_Occasionally not getting enough sleep will not affect your health. Taking a warm bath before bed, or doing some light stretches can help you relax for a sound night\'s sleep.
[CS_810667]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. A proper diet can help promote deep sleep.

[CS_810682]_Getting enough deep sleep is an indicator of high quality sleep, and maintaining good habits can help promote deep sleep. The digestive system slows down during sleep. Avoid large meals close to bedtime, as they can lead to indigestion and negatively impact sleep quality.
[CS_810471]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Going to bed earlier can help you get more deep sleep.

[CS_810434]_Getting enough deep sleep is an indicator of high quality sleep. It\'s normal to go through several sleep cycles in one night. Deep sleep is more likely to occur in the early sleep cycles.
[CS_810716]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Exercises regularly can help promote deep sleep.

[CS_810557]_Your wearable device can help record exercise information and set training plans. Avoid high intensity exercises before bed, since high body temperatures can make it difficult to fall asleep.

[CS_810586]_Choosing the suitable bedding, pillow, and mattress can help you get enough deep sleep. Bedding that is breathable with moderate softness and a mattress with the proper firmness are best. Wash bedding regularly to avoid mites and keep the bed comfortable and clean.
[CS_810763]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Relaxing more can help you get more deep sleep.
[CS_810652]_You can promote deep sleep by doing light exercises to relax the body, such as walking up stairs or stretching, to resolve tension before it accumulates.
[CS_810662]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Relaxing before bed can help you get more deep sleep.
[CS_810669]_Avoid overthinking, watching TV, or using your phone before bedtime. Deep breathing exercises or other relaxing exercises can also help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810475]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Going to bed too late can negatively impact deep sleep.

[CS_810436]_Going to bed too late can negatively impact deep sleep. Adequate deep sleep stimulates the circulation of skin capillaries and promotes skin regeneration, which brightens your skin. Set an alarm and go to bed early to get plenty of beauty sleep.
[CS_810543]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Going to bed earlier can help you get more deep sleep.
[CS_810617]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Avoid caffeinated beverages to get more deep sleep.

[CS_810757]_Avoid drinking too many caffeinated beverages such as coffee or cocoa even if you\'re feeling tired. Caffeine can stay in your system for up to %1$s, and drinking caffeinated beverages in the afternoon can impact your sleep quality. For better sleep quality, consider drinking warm milk instead.
[CS_810594]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Exercising can help promote deep sleep.

[CS_810651]_Exercising regularly and moderately every week (including speed walking or jogging for half an hour or more) can help promote deep sleep, which is more likely to occur when the body is tired.
[CS_810655]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Avoiding large meals before bed can help you stay asleep longer.
[CS_810670]_Avoid large meals %1$s before bed. If you do eat before bed, avoid peppers, chocolate, tea, alcohol, or other stimulants, and eat a light snack instead.
[CS_810473]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Too much light in the bedroom can negatively impact your deep sleep time.

[CS_810448]_Light pollution, including light from phone and TV screens or streetlamps can suppress melatonin production. Low melatonin levels are linked to poor sleep quality. Use blackout curtains or a sleeping mask to prevent light pollution.
[CS_810728]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Taking a warm bath before bed to help you relax and get more deep sleep.

[CS_810574]_Take a bath for 15 to 20 minutes with essential oils such as lemon, lavender, or sage before going to sleep. High body temperature makes it more difficult to fall asleep so avoid using bathwater that\'s too hot.
[CS_810614]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Having a quiet and private sleeping environment can help you get more deep sleep.
[CS_810583]_Having too many distractions in the bedroom may negatively impact sleep quality. If your pets are keeping you up at night, consider moving their beds to another room.
[CS_810771]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Maintaining a regular schedule can help promote deep sleep.
[CS_810650]_Having a regular schedule can help the body maintain regular sleep rhythms and promote deep sleep. Set a schedule and use your wearable device to set soft alarms.
[CS_810656]_Deep sleep accounted for %1$s of overall sleep last night. Outdoor activities can help promote deep sleep.

[CS_810692]_Getting plenty of sunlight during the day can aid melatonin production at night, which leads to more deep sleep. Spending 2 hours or more outdoors everyday can ensure your body is getting enough sunlight.
[CS_810491]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. A proper diet can help promote deep sleep.

[CS_810447]_A diet rich in vitamin B, vitamin D, calcium, magnesium, potassium, and other minerals can promote deep sleep. Soybeans are rich in vitamin B3; malt and potatoes contain vitamin B6; yogurt and kelp are rich in vitamin B12.
[CS_810564]_Deep sleep accounted for only %1$s of overall sleep last night. Aromatherapy can help promote deep sleep.
[CS_810742]_Aromatherapy oils, such as lemon, sandalwood, lavender, chamomile, or sage can be used with aromatherapy lamps or diluted and sprayed in the bedroom.
[CS_810648]_The quality of your sleep last night was good, with a continuous deep sleep of %1$s.
[CS_810619]_Continuous deep sleep lets your brain rest and rejuvenate. A noise-free environment can help you sleep uninterrupted.
[CS_810565]_Continuous deep sleep lets your brain rest and rejuvenate. Stretching before bed relaxes the body and helps you to sleep uninterrupted.
[CS_810580]_Light from inside and outside your room can disturb sleep. Avoid having sources of artificial light and choose curtains that block light and reduce sound to help you fall asleep.
[CS_810600]_Experts recommend avoiding napping in the afternoon. Napping for more than %1$s during the day may make it harder to stay asleep at night.
[CS_810511]_Avoid overthinking, watching TV, or using your phone before bedtime. Deep breathing exercises or other relaxing exercises can also help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810620]_Continuous deep sleep lets your brain rest and rejuvenate. Comfortable temperature and humidity levels promote uninterrupted rest.
[CS_810550]_Your continuous deep sleep last night was %1$s. Deep sleep was fragmented.

[CS_810722]_The body\'s biological clock plays an important role in adjusting deep sleep. Maintaining a regular schedule by going to bed and waking up at the same time everyday can help your biological clock adapt to circadian rhythm and improve the continuity of deep sleep.
[CS_810745]_A proper diet can help improve your sleep. Foods rich in magnesium, such as green vegetables, avocados, bananas, and nuts, can improve sleep quality and continuity.

[CS_810770]_Your brain actively blocks the nerve channels for sound transmission during deep sleep, but too much noise can still interrupt your sleep. Closing your bedroom door and windows or using earplugs can reduce the impact of noise on your sleep.
[CS_810509]_Calming bedtime activities such as reading or listening to music can improve sleep.

[CS_810618]_Drinking too much water before bed can wake you up in the middle of the night. Instead, rehydrate with a glass of water in the morning, which can improve blood circulation and help you feel alert throughout the day.
[CS_810556]_Deep breathing exercises can help calm you and avoid overthinking before bed. With practice, these exercises will improve the quality of your deep sleep.

[CS_810575]_Is your mattress suitable for you? Lie down on the bed and try to insert your palm under your body. If it is difficult to do so, then your mattress is too soft. If your palm can move around easily, then the mattress is too firm. If your palm can fit perfectly beneath your waist, then your mattress provides the ideal support for your back.

[CS_810604]_A pillow firmness that suits your sleeping habits can help you fall asleep. Use a firmer pillow if you like to sleep on your side or back and a softer pillow if you like to sleep on your stomach. Adding herbs such as lavender, orange peel, or clover can also promote sleep.

[CS_810495]_Aromatherapy can help improve sleep quality. You can add lavender oil to your body wash or moisturizer or place a dry cloth on your forehead after soaking it in warm water with added lavender oil.

[CS_810615]_Caffeine, alcohol, and nicotine can make it more difficult to get enough sleep. These substances stimulate the central nervous system, which can lead to nocturnal awakenings. Replacing these with herbal drinks such as mint, chamomile, or rosehip tea can improve sleep quality.

[CS_810723]_Moderate exercise (such as speed walking and jogging for half an hour or more) can help improve the quality of your sleep. You can use the Huawei Health app to plan the intensity and length of your training.
[CS_810480]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s. For improved quality, maintain a healthy work-life balance and avoid being overly fatigued.
[CS_810540]_Fatigue can lead to heavy breathing and snoring. A good work-life balance can improve your breathing quality during sleep.
[CS_810608]_Your sleep quality was %1$s last night. Choose a pillow with good neck support to improve your breathing.

[CS_810578]_Your breathing quality last night was a little low. For improved quality, choose the appropriate bedding and pillow firmness for your sleeping habits. Sleeping on your side can also keep the pharynx and airway open during sleep and maintain regular breathing.
[CS_810761]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s, which was a little low, but the sleep quality was good.
[CS_810602]_Weight gain can lead to irregular breathing and snoring.
[CS_810735]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s. Avoiding alcohol and tobacco can help improve breathing quality during sleep.

[CS_810538]_Smoking can lead to respiratory problems and alcohol can lead to or worsen snoring. Avoiding alcohol and tobacco can decrease your chance of snoring and improve breathing quality during sleep.
[CS_810628]_Your breathing quality has been below the standard level lately, last night\'s was %1$s. Nasal congestions caused by colds can negatively impact breathing quality during sleep.

[CS_810425]_Upper respiratory infections can lead to airway stenosis, soft tissue loosening, and poor breathing quality during sleep. If you are not congested, sleeping on your side can help prevent airway blockage.
[CS_810481]_Your breathing quality was %1$s last night, which is lower than the standard level.
[CS_810729]_Weight gain can cause irregular breathing during sleep. Exercise regularly to prevent weight gain.
[CS_810611]_Your breathing quality last night was only %1$s. Glossopharyngeal discomfort can negatively impact breathing quality during sleep.
[CS_810755]_Increasing tongue exercises such as sliding or rolling your tongue can help promote tongue and throat health and improve breathing quality during sleep.
[CS_810590]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s, which was a little low. Congestion can negatively impact breathing quality during sleep.

[CS_810764]_Nasal irritation or discomfort may affect the breathing quality during sleep. Avoid pollen, dust, and other allergens, wear a mask when it is smoggy or cold, regularly cleaning the nasal passage, and massaging sinus points are all effective means of prevention.
[CS_810567]_Your breathing quality last night was only %1$s.
[CS_810703]_Choosing an appropriate pillow that supports your neck can help to improve your breathing quality during sleep. A pillow that is not suited for you may lead to airway blockage.
[CS_810626]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s, which was a little low. Fatigue can negatively impact breathing quality during sleep.
[CS_810426]_Fatigue can cause irregular breathing and snoring during sleep. A good work-life balance and regular rest can help.
[CS_810717]_Your breathing quality last night was %1$s, which is below the standard level.
[CS_810559]_Weight gain negatively impacts breathing quality during sleep. A healthy diet and regular exercise can prevent weight gain.
[CS_810609]_The breathing quality of your sleep last night was %1$s. This past week your breathing quality has been lower than normal.

[CS_810579]_Snoring is a symptom of poor breathing during sleep. Snoring may lead to a lack of oxygen to the brain, memory loss, a lack of deep sleep, and high blood pressure. Avoid smoking and drinking alcohol if you snore, as these can worsen respiratory symptoms and exacerbate irregular breathing during sleep.
[CS_810758]_The breathing quality of your sleep last night was %1$s. This past week your breathing quality has been lower than normal.

[CS_810593]_Snoring indicates poor breathing quality during sleep. If you have a history of breathing with your mouth during sleep, waking up often during the night, and feeling tired after sleep, you may want to consult a medical professional.
[CS_810532]_A blocked nose, a cold, or a sore throat can affect your breathing quality. Exercising may help reduce your chance of snoring.
[CS_810463]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your sleep last night. That\'s about normal.
[CS_810568]_Dreams mostly occur during REM sleep. Maintaining regular REM sleep can help promote creativity and relieve stress.
[CS_810699]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your sleep last night. That\'s about normal.
[CS_810587]_People can usually recount their dreams if they wake up during the REM sleep stage. The longer the gap between REM sleep and waking, the harder dreams are to remember.

[CS_810534]_Dreams mostly occur during REM sleep. Dreaming does not indicate poor sleep quality, rather it satisfies a normal biological need. Remembering dreams often can indicate inadequate deep sleep time. Regular exercise can promote deep sleep and improve sleep quality.
[CS_810449]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little high. Relaxing before bed can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810460]_Dreams mostly occur during REM sleep. Controlling stress caused by work and avoiding overthinking and fatigue can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810686]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little high. Relaxing before bed can help improve sleep quality.
[CS_810726]_Too much REM sleep can cause you to wake up still tired. Practice breathing exercises before sleep for more balanced REM cycles and improved sleep quality.
[CS_810461]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little high, but overall sleep quality was good.
[CS_810736]_Dreams usually occur during REM sleep. Try writing down your dreams after you wake up, focusing on your feelings, who was present, the location, and events.
[CS_810529]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little high. Exercise can help improve sleep quality.

[CS_810772]_Too many dreams can indicate that REM sleep accounts for too much of overall sleep. Running can help you prevent getting too much REM sleep. For best results, use your wearable device to create a running schedule.
[CS_810572]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little high. Going to bed earlier can help improve sleep quality.

[CS_810700]_Dreams occur during REM sleep, and REM cycles occur more often in the second half of your sleep. Too much REM sleep can cause fatigue. If you dream often, adjust your schedule so that you sleep earlier and wake up earlier.
[CS_810451]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little low.

[CS_810468]_REM sleep is important for creativity and mood regulation. Missing out on REM sleep occasionally is fine, as it will not negatively impact your health and your body catches up within a few nights.
[CS_810526]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little low. REM sleep can help promote creativity.

[CS_810563]_REM sleep, the phase during which most dreams occur, is important for creativity, mood regulation, and stress relief. Studies show that staying away from caffeine, nicotine, and alcohol improves the quality of REM sleep.
[CS_810453]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little low, but overall sleep quality was good.

[CS_810566]_REM sleep, the phase during which most dreams occur, is important for creativity and mood regulation. REM occurs more often in the second half of your sleep. To get more REM sleep, increase your total sleep time by a reasonable amount.
[CS_810762]_REM sleep accounted for %1$s of your overall sleep last night, which was a little low, but overall sleep quality was good.

[CS_810603]_REM sleep satisfies a normal biological need and is associated with dreaming. Missing out on REM sleep occasionally is fine, as it will not negatively impact your health and your body catches up within a few nights.
[CS_810687]_You slept for %1$s last night. Your sleep quality was good.

[CS_810576]_Normal sleep architecture includes REM (rapid eye movement) and NREM (non-rapid eye movement) sleep. NREM sleep includes light sleep and deep sleep, and REM sleep is usually associated with dreaming.
[CS_810768]_You slept for %1$s last night. The quality of your sleep was okay.

[CS_810521]_Most people who suffer from poor sleep quality have poor sleeping habits. These include irregular lifestyle habits, a lack of adequate sunlight, a lack of exercise, or frequent consumption and use of coffee, alcohol and cigarettes.
[CS_797427]_Your blood sugar was within the ideal range for %2$s of the workout you started at %1$s. Touch for details.
[CS_867349]_A wearable feature package (%1$s) is required for the voice assistant and other features. Download now?
[CS_889975]_Download a feature package for your watch to enhance your use of WeChat and other features.
[CS_890724]_As a %1$s user, you get %2$s free when you activate the %3$s service.
[CS_1153672]_Over the past %d days, your step count has been low
[CS_1104953]_Watch can only connect to the demo phone when in Demo mode.
[CS_319276]_You have completed your step goal for the day
[CS_425594]_Log in to your HUAWEI ID in Health
[CS_923156]_Due to system updates, permissions need to be granted again in the Health app for access to all the features.
[CS_988724]_Your total stand hours today are a little low. View details >>
[CS_1051215]_The Health app needs the Physical activity permission.
[CS_1173846]_Your total roll hours today are a little low. View details >>
[CS_1174454]_Quickly see current and recent step count data.
[CS_554566]_The connection fails, the device needs to adapt to the 0x09 and 0x15 field in Bluetooth protocol 5.1.7
